tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificateAuthoritiesActivate
tools.description: Activate a CertificateAuthority that is in state AWAITING_USER_ACTIVATION and is of type SUBORDINATE. After the parent Certificate Authority signs a certificate signing request from FetchCertificateAuthorityCsr, this method can complete the activation process.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificateAuthoritiesCertificateRevocationListsList
tools.description: Lists CertificateRevocationLists.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificateAuthoritiesCreate
tools.description: Create a new CertificateAuthority in a given Project and Location.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificateAuthoritiesDisable
tools.description: Disable a CertificateAuthority.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificateAuthoritiesEnable
tools.description: Enable a CertificateAuthority.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificateAuthoritiesFetch
tools.description: Fetch a certificate signing request (CSR) from a CertificateAuthority that is in state AWAITING_USER_ACTIVATION and is of type SUBORDINATE. The CSR must then be signed by the desired parent Certificate Authority, which could be another CertificateAuthority resource, or could be an on-prem certificate authority. See also ActivateCertificateAuthority.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificateAuthoritiesList
tools.description: Lists CertificateAuthorities.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificateAuthoritiesUndelete
tools.description: Undelete a CertificateAuthority that has been deleted.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificatesCreate
tools.description: Create a new Certificate in a given Project, Location from a particular CaPool.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificatesList
tools.description: Lists Certificates.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCertificatesRevoke
tools.description: Revoke a Certificate.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsCreate
tools.description: Create a CaPool.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsFetchCaCerts
tools.description: FetchCaCerts returns the current trust anchor for the CaPool. This will include CA certificate chains for all ACTIVE CertificateAuthority resources in the CaPool.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCaPoolsList
tools.description: Lists CaPools.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCertificateTemplatesCreate
tools.description: Create a new CertificateTemplate in a given Project and Location.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCertificateTemplatesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCertificateTemplatesList
tools.description: Lists CertificateTemplates.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCertificateTemplatesPatch
tools.description: Update a CertificateTemplate.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCertificateTemplatesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsCertificateTemplatesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsOperationsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a long-running operation. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result. It does not cancel the operation. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

tools.name: projects.privatecaProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
